authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(16) — Bridgeport Reservoir and tributaries
sources.quotedText: (16) Bridgeport Reservoir and tributaries (Mono Co.) except Swauger Creek from Bridgeport Reservoir upstream to Highway 395, and Swauger Creek from Bridgeport Reservoir upstream to the private property fence line above the Forest Service campground. Last Sat. in Apr. through Nov. 15. 5 trout

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(a) — General Provisions for waters listed in the special-regulations table
sources.quotedText: Unless otherwise provided, it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit.

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Reservoir layer record for gaz_id 254662, "Bridgeport Reservoir", Reservoir, Mono County, CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":254662,"gaz_name":"Bridgeport Reservoir","gaz_featureclass":"Reservoir","fcode":39009,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Mono"}; geometry (Web Mercator -13272356.9731, 4620789.2522) converts to lon -119.227611, lat 38.292219, about 380m from the file's recorded coordinate (-119.2260, 38.2954), within the confirmation tolerance.

regulations.humanSummary: Bridgeport Reservoir and tributaries open last Saturday in April through November 15
regulations.verbatimText: Last Sat. in Apr. through Nov. 15.

parameters.note: Two segments of Swauger Creek are excluded from this water's regulations and are governed separately: Swauger Creek from Bridgeport Reservoir upstream to Highway 395, and Swauger Creek from Bridgeport Reservoir upstream to the private property fence line above the Forest Service campground.

regulations.humanSummary: Excludes two Swauger Creek segments from Bridgeport Reservoir's regulation
regulations.verbatimText: except Swauger Creek from Bridgeport Reservoir upstream to Highway 395, and Swauger Creek from Bridgeport Reservoir upstream to the private property fence line above the Forest Service campground.

parameters.counting_rule: The table entry sets a 5-trout daily bag limit; per 14 CCR 7.50(a)(4), unless otherwise provided it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit, so the possession limit also equals 5.

regulations.humanSummary: 5 trout daily bag and possession limit

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
